title: Pliada di am Imperium
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Pliada di am Imperium''''' was a plaza at the western base of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] in [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It formed the eastern nexus of the [[Glitannai Esplanade]], where it terminated at the Palace. It hosted a ceremony that celebrated the reorganization of [[Commission for the Protection of the Republic/Legends|COMPOR]] just after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was established.
